title: Cross-Zone Protocol Anomaly Detection — IEC 61850 GOOSE Floods

compliance.assurance_rationale: Auto-migrated from cat-22 markdown on Phase 1.3 run, then normalised in Phase A (clause 'IEC 62443-3-2 / Cross-zone protocol anomaly detection' → 'FR 6.2'). Requires SME review to confirm clause accuracy, mode (satisfies vs detects-violation-of), and assurance level (contributing/partial/full).

spl:
index=ot_sub sourcetype="iec61850:goose" earliest=-24h
| stats count by app_id, src_mac, vlan, bay
| eventstats median(count) as med by app_id
| eval ratio=round(count/med,2)
| where ratio>5 OR count>10000
| sort - ratio
value: Spots unusual GOOSE/AppID volumes between substation zones indicating mis-wiring, VLAN bleed, or malicious injection.
implementation: (1) Baseline per bay during commissioning; (2) segregate process bus; (3) integrate relay vendor validation; (4) NERC/IEC dual use where applicable.
visualization: Time chart, Table, Single value (anomalous APPIDs).
knownFalsePositives: Administrative tasks, scheduled jobs or platform updates can match this pattern — correlate with change management, maintenance windows and user role before raising severity.
